subject: January 10 Show Lineup - Guest Confirmation Needed
body: TJ, confirming Pastor Greer for the 7:30 segment on Jan 10. His topic is 'Starting the New Year with Purpose.' I'll have my script ready by Thursday evening. Let me know if sponsors need any copy changes before Friday.

subject: WGSP Saturday - You're Confirmed for January 10
body: Pastor Greer, you are all set for Saturday, January 10 at 7:30 AM. Please arrive at the Beale Street studio by 7:15. Parking is on the south side of the building. I'll call you Thursday to go over the segment questions. Looking forward to it.

subject: Morning Reflections - This Saturday: New Year, New Purpose
body: Good morning, friends. This Saturday I'm joined by Pastor William Greer for a conversation on beginning 2026 with clarity and intention. We'll also hear from our sponsors Covenant Insurance Group and Mitchell's Flowers. Tune in to WGSP 1490 AM, Saturday 7-9 AM Central. Peace, Rebecca.

subject: Saturday Brunch - Feb 14 Is Your Birthday!
body: Sandra, I know we always do Cafe Eclectic after the show, but your birthday falls on a Saturday this year. I'm thinking we extend brunch a little longer than usual. I'll have us out of the studio by 9:15. See you then - I'm bringing your card.

subject: Morning Reflections - February: Love That Lasts
body: Friends, February on Morning Reflections is about love in all its forms - the kind that shows up, stays, and does the quiet work. This Saturday we open with a reflection on 1 Corinthians 13 and close with a listener story. Sponsors this month: Covenant Insurance Group and Bluff City Auto Care. Tune in Saturday 7-9 AM on WGSP 1490 AM.

subject: Community Health Fair - Planning Kickoff
body: Deacon Mosley, ready to start planning the community health fair. I'd like to loop in Sandra Coles from Bluff City Community College for the blood pressure and diabetes screening tables. Can we meet after church one Sunday in March to map out dates and volunteers? My calendar is open most Sundays after noon.

subject: Morning Reflections - March: Seasons of Renewal
body: March brings new ground and new beginnings. This month on Morning Reflections we're talking about resilience - what it looks like to bloom after a hard season. Rev. Angela Dawson joins me on March 14 for a conversation on ministry and margin. Tune in Saturday mornings 7-9 AM, WGSP 1490 AM.

subject: WGSP Guest Spot - March 14, 8:00 AM Segment
body: Angela, so glad you said yes. You're booked for the 8 AM segment on March 14 - topic: 'Staying Whole in Ministry.' I'll send segment questions by Thursday March 12. Studio is at 152 Beale Street, arrive 7:45 AM. Let me know if anything changes.

subject: CPE Continuing Education Hours - Q1 Update
body: Dr. Vickers, wanted to share my Q1 CPE CE update. I've completed 14 hours through March - on track for the December 31 deadline (50 hrs required, 28 done so far). I have two workshops registered for February and March. Happy to send documentation whenever you need it.

subject: New Year Sunrise Service - January 4 | Morning Reflections Special
body: Friends, this Sunday I have the honor of delivering the New Year sunrise meditation at Grace Community Church - a dawn service on light in the darkness and new beginnings. After the service I'll be back for a special Morning Reflections broadcast - tune in Saturday January 3 at 7 AM for our New Year reflection episode. Wishing you a joyful and peace-filled new year.

subject: Winter Sponsor Copy - Mitchell's Flowers New Year Promo
body: TJ, Mitchell's Flowers sent updated copy for the New Year and Valentine's Day windows. I've attached the 30-second spot script they approved. Can you have engineering load it before Friday's prep run? Valentine's Day is February 14 so we need the Valentine's version ready by February 6.

subject: January on Morning Reflections - Honoring the Women of Faith, Gratitude & More
body: January is here and a new year is opening before us. This month on Morning Reflections: a Honoring the Women of Faith special on January 10, a conversation on caregiving with Deacon Charles Mosley on January 17, and a listener call-in on January 24. Sponsored by Mitchell's Flowers and Covenant Insurance Group. Saturdays 7-9 AM on WGSP 1490 AM.

subject: New Year Family Brunch - January 11, The Country Table
body: Naomi, I've made a reservation at The Country Table for a New Year family brunch - Sunday January 11 at 12:30 PM, party of 4 (you, me, Grandma Dorothy, and Marcus if he can make it down from school). Let me know if the time works. I'll pick up Dorothy at 11:45.

subject: Health Fair - October Date Confirmed, Volunteer Roster Needed
body: Deacon Mosley, we're locked in for October 3 for the community health fair on the Grace Community grounds. Sandra confirmed she can bring two nursing students for the screening tables. I need your volunteer roster by December 15 so I can finalize the program. I'll handle the Canva flyer and radio promo on the show.

subject: This Winter on Morning Reflections - Rest & the Long Game
body: The new year is upon us, friends, and these quiet winter weeks are asking us to slow down. This season I'm leaning into the theme of rest as a spiritual practice - because rest is not laziness, it is obedience. Guests include Rev. Angela Dawson, and our special listener anniversary segment is coming in March. All season long, Saturday mornings 7-9 AM, WGSP 1490 AM.

subject: Pre-Recorded Broadcast - Script Attached
body: TJ, attached is the pre-recorded script and segment order for the Saturday I'll be away. Engineering can air it from the vault - I'll have all audio files uploaded to the shared drive by January 23. Bluff City Auto Care has a weekend spot they want included; their copy is in the folder. Thanks for handling it.
